completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for domain extraction E2E empty processing/domain status timeout. No source or parent certification fields modified.

Implemented production/runtime fix: artifact detail exposes domain_extraction_status/domain_data; recipe-shaped plain text is classified as recipe; degraded ML fallback and Go processing preserve domain-specific artifact types; domain dispatch matches contracts using the stored artifact type; ML domain extraction has a config-gated degraded recipe fallback; smackerel-core Compose env sets PROMPT_CONTRACTS_DIR=/app/prompt_contracts. No E2E assertion weakening.

Focused domain E2E passed: timeout 420 ./smackerel.sh --env test test e2e --go-run TestE2E_DomainExtraction exited 0 with domain=pending then domain=completed and recipe domain_data. Repo gates passed: format --check, check, unit. Broad E2E command exited 1, but TestE2E_DomainExtraction passed inside it; remaining failure is TestOperatorStatus_RecommendationProvidersEmptyByDefault.

Bug packet artifact lint passed for current in_progress status: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/026-domain-extraction/bugs/BUG-026-002-domain-e2e-status-timeout exited 0. Final validation-owned promotion remains open.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered domain extraction blocker. Existing BUG-026-001 covers artifact traceability only and does not cover this live-stack status timeout.
